raw_consumer_statement:
A fraudulent charge in the amount of {$1600.00} that was posted to my Best Buy Store credit card issued by Citi Bank on XX/XX/XXXX, in XXXX, NY. An additional charge of {$1500.00} was made the following day, XX/XX/XXXX, at the same location. I did not authorize or conduct either of these transactions. 

At the time of both charges, I was working from XXXX XXXX  to XXXX XXXX in XXXX XXXX. Additionally, I am a resident of XXXX, NY, and have no ties to the XXXX locations where these purchases were made. 

Upon discovering the charges, I immediately contacted Citi Bank to report and dispute both transactions. While the XX/XX/XXXX charge of {$1500.00} was successfully reversed and removed from my account, the XX/XX/XXXX charge of {$1600.00} remains unresolved and has not been credited back to my account. 

For further clarification, my previous card was lost in XX/XX/XXXX. A replacement card was issued, but I did not activate it until XX/XX/XXXX. Since activation, I have not made any purchases with this card.
